inspection.method: All 19 screenshots were loaded as pixels into Fable's visual context (user-provided in-conversation); 03-closeup-hs-active-border-color-row.png was additionally re-read from disk with the Read tool. No finding is inferred from filenames alone.

unusableFiles.reason: Mis-crop: contains two lines of rendered document text, not the app row. HS side of comparison 2 assessed from 01-side-by-side-general.png instead; re-capture requested after fixes.

inspection.valueContentExcluded: HM shows live config values, HS shows model values; value differences are not reported as defects — only control chrome, layout, and behavior.

observations.spacingCardWidthRowHeight: comparable; HM rows have slightly roomier padding; both apps place headings above cards

differences: HS Gaps rows use wide plain text entries; HM uses compact -/+ spin groups
HS formats integer options as '0.00'; HM shows '1'
HS color-row swatches are ~22px sharp squares with '+' before the angle spinner; HM uses ~44x28 rounded checkered tiles with '+' after the angle spinner at row end
HS exposes extra rows (Nogroup Border, Nogroup Border Active; Window snap gap, Monitor snap gap, Border overlap, Respect gaps) - deliberate 341-row model, denser than HM
HM shows 'Resize on border' under Borders; HS keeps it on another page
HS shows 'Needs attention' badge on Layout row; HM shows no inline statuses (badge explicitly allowed by prior acceptance rules; user decision)
HS subtitles are raw official descriptions with inconsistent capitalization and two-line wraps; HM uses single-line sentence-case summaries

HS sidebar is missing XWayland and Ecosystem under ADVANCED; HM shows both. Source: sidebar_items() hides model-backed pages claiming zero rows at runtime (src/ui/window.rs:607) - runtime page-claiming anomaly to investigate
requiredFixes: Compact spin controls for numeric General rows; plain entry only where multi-value syntax requires it
Integer formatting for integer options
Swatch tile geometry and '+'-after-angle reorder (see comparison 2)
Sentence-case single-line subtitles and title casing
Investigate and fix XWayland/Ecosystem page hiding at runtime
acceptanceCriteria: Re-captured side-by-side shows -/+ spinners on Gaps/Borders rows
XWayland and Ecosystem visible in HS sidebar or documented reason they are empty at runtime

observations.hmRowOrder: checkered tile, backspace-remove, tile, remove, '45 - +' spinner, '+' at row end

differences: Tile size: HS ~22x22px vs HM ~44x28px
Tile shape: HS square/sharp vs HM wide rounded rect
Checkerboard: HM clearly visible under translucent color; HS tiles opaque in this capture so checkerboard rendering unverifiable from pixels (closeup missing)
Spacing between tile and remove: similar, not a defect
Remove button placement: both immediately right of each tile - matches
Plus placement: HS before angle spinner; HM after angle spinner at row end - mismatch
Angle spinner: both segmented 'value - +' groups, visually close
Overall: structure matches, geometry and ordering do not - HS does not yet pass as HM-equivalent
requiredFixes: Enlarge swatch tiles to ~44x28 rounded
Move add-stop '+' to end of control group after the angle spinner
Re-capture a valid HS closeup
acceptanceCriteria: Valid HS closeup shows rounded ~44x28 checkered tiles, remove per tile, angle spinner, then '+' last - same order as 04-closeup-hm-active-border-color-row.png
comparisons.confidence: high for HM (closeup); medium-high for HS (full-page resolution only)

observations.hsSurface: popover attached to swatch; page content ('45', remove icons, 'Needs attention') visibly bleeds through the picker surface
observations.hmSurface: centered opaque floating dialog with shadow; content behind slightly dimmed

differences: Surface/dimming: HS translucent popover vs HM opaque elevated dialog
Dialog size: HS ~370px wide and short; HM wider (~430px) and taller
Header: HS Cancel is plain text; HM Cancel is a pill button; title and blue Select pill match

Palette structure transposed: HS 8x5 grid of small (~40px) detached squares (row 1 grayscale, rows 2-5 hue rows); HM 9 hue columns x 5 vertically contiguous shades, ~72x44 tiles, rounded column ends, includes brown and neutral columns
Custom row: HS 'Custom' label + bare '+' icon, no stored swatches; HM '+' tile followed by saved checkered custom swatches with a checkmark on the selected one
Verdict: HS still looks too raw/simple compared to HM - yes
requiredFixes: Present picker as opaque in-window adw::Dialog
Rebuild palette as hue-column shade-stacks with HM-scale tiles
Pill-style Cancel button
Custom row with persisted custom swatches and selected checkmark
acceptanceCriteria: Re-captured HS palette shows opaque dialog with no page text readable through it
Custom row grows as custom colors are picked

observations.hsLayoutOrder: full-width preview strip -> full-width hex entry -> stepped SV rectangle with hollow-circle marker -> horizontal hue slider with plain gray trough -> horizontal blue-filled alpha slider without checkerboard; translucent popover
observations.hmLayoutOrder: top row [eyedropper | rounded preview swatch | hex entry] -> vertical rainbow hue bar (left) + large continuous SV square with crosshair lines (right) -> horizontal checkerboard-under-gradient alpha slider; larger opaque dialog whose top and scrolled captures show different regions (scrollable)

differences: Layout order does not match HM
Eyedropper: HS none; HM present
Preview/hex: HS separate full-width rows; HM compact three-element top row
Hue: HS horizontal with plain trough (no rainbow gradient visible); HM vertical rainbow bar
SV area: HS visibly stepped/blocky cells with dot marker; HM continuous gradient with full-length crosshair lines
Alpha: HS standard blue-filled scale, no checkerboard; HM checkered gradient trough
Scroll/resize: HM dialog larger and scrollable; HS fixed compact popover would clip an HM-scale layout - HS needs a bigger dialog and/or scrollable content
No missing bottom controls beyond the eyedropper row placement
requiredFixes: Restructure to HM order: eyedropper+preview+hex row, vertical rainbow hue, large continuous SV with crosshair, checkered alpha
Continuous SV gradient rendering (replace stepped cells)
Custom-drawn hue and alpha troughs
Eyedropper via XDG desktop portal color picking
Host in the same opaque adw::Dialog as the palette view with scrollable content
acceptanceCriteria: Re-captured HS custom view pixel-comparable to 08a/08b: three-element top row, vertical rainbow hue, smooth SV with crosshair, checkered alpha, opaque surface

observations.hs: Bezier Curve Editor card without icon/chevron; flat Animation Records list with raw 'speed 3.00 (enabled 1, bezier quick)' subtitles and menu buttons but no switches; large 'Animations & curves' workbench card with record dropdown, Speed/Enabled/Curve controls, five-button rows, supervised-preview prose, and 'Save writes once with a backup / Requires Safe Live Save Mode / Full safety detail: Safety Details page' footer on the normal page
observations.hm: Bezier row with curve icon and chevron; sections General/Global/Windows & Layers/Fading/Workspaces/Other; every record a switch row with friendly summary ('4.0ds - easeOutQuint', 'inherited - 8.0ds - default') plus menu button and expander chevron; no safety prose

promptClaimsVerified.hsRecordMenuDiffersFromHmRowControls: partially - HS rows have menu buttons but no enable switch, no expander, raw subtitles

requiredFixes: Regroup records into HM's six sections (General/Global/Windows & Layers/Fading/Workspaces/Other)
Make each record a switch row with friendly 'speed - curve [- style]' subtitle
Move workbench Speed/Curve/Preview/Save controls into per-record menu/expander
Move supervised-preview and save-gating prose to detail popover and Safety Details
Add icon + chevron to Bezier row
Constraint: presentation only - gated preview/save flow must not change
acceptanceCriteria: Re-captured side-by-side shows grouped switch rows with friendly subtitles
No raw '(enabled 1, bezier ...)' text on the page
No proof prose on the normal page
Bezier row has icon and chevron
All existing safety guards still green

observations.hs: Bezier editor is a separate top-level window that Hyprland tiled - its own frame stacked above the main window, both tiled
observations.hm: Bezier editor is an in-window modal overlay dialog centered inside the HM window with page content dimmed behind

differences: HS Bezier editor is incorrectly a separate top-level window - confirmed from pixels
It should be an attached modal/dialog overlay like HM's - confirmed behavior mismatch
requiredFixes: Present the editor as adw::Dialog on the main window: renders as an overlay widget inside the parent window, never maps a new toplevel surface, so tiling compositors cannot tile it
gtk::Window with set_transient_for + set_modal is not sufficient on Hyprland (transients may still tile or depend on user windowrules)
Apply the same adw::Dialog host to the color picker (comparisons 3-4)
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the Bezier editor produces zero new Hyprland clients (hyprctl clients count unchanged)
Re-captured screenshot shows it overlaying the Animations page inside the main window, matching HM
comparisons.findingSource: image-inspection (fix approach from GTK/libadwaita knowledge, not pixels)

fixPriority: 2. Animations page regrouping and safety-prose relocation (5)
5. Color row geometry/order (2) and General numeric controls (1)
deliberateNonFixes: HS's extra rows (Nogroup/Snap detail) - the 341-row model is a feature
'Needs attention' badge - explicitly allowed by prior acceptance rules; user decision
